post.description: Enqueues a job to extract media from a target URL using Apify.

Checks a claim (e.g. from a video transcript) against the knowledge base and returns a cited verdict. Out-of-scope input (not health-related) is a normal 200 response with in_scope=false, not an error.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of documents.

post.description: Ingests a new document into the knowledge base.

get.description: Retrieves a single document by its ID.

delete.description: Deletes a document by its ID.

get.description: Generate a presigned GET URL for accessing uploaded media files by S3 key.
get.summary: Get presigned GET URL for media access

get.description: Generate a presigned POST URL for uploading media files.
get.summary: Get presigned POST URL for media upload

post.description: Receives successful run notifications from Apify.

defaultDatasetId.description: DefaultDatasetId is the ID of the dataset created by the Actor run.

status.description: Status indicates the final status of the Actor run (e.g., SUCCEEDED, FAILED).

eventType.description: EventType indicates the type of event that triggered the webhook.

resource.description: Resource contains details of the Apify Actor run that just finished.

text.description:
Text is the claim or message to check — may be a direct question, a
casual claim, or a sentence pulled from a video transcript.

document_id.description: DocumentID is the source document this evidence came from.

index.description:
Index is the same 0-based number the judge's Reasoning text references
inline as "[N]" — use it to link a prose citation back to this entry.

text.description: Text is the matched text — a chunk's text, or a fact's subject-predicate-object.

in_scope.description:
InScope is false if the input wasn't a health-related inquiry at all —
this system doesn't take inquiries unrelated to health.

overall_summary.description:
OverallSummary is a short rollup across every sub-claim's verdict.
Empty when InScope is false.

refusal_reason.description: RefusalReason explains why InScope is false. Empty when InScope is true.

sub_claims.description: SubClaims is the per-sub-claim breakdown. Empty when InScope is false.

file_key.description: FileKey is the object storage key (e.g., S3/MinIO) where the document file was uploaded.

filename.description: Filename is the name of the document file.

filesize.description: Filesize is the size of the document file in bytes.

filetype.description: Filetype is the mime type of the document file (e.g., "application/pdf", "text/plain").

page_count.description: PageCount is the number of pages in the document.

publication_year.description: PublicationYear is the year the document was published.

publisher_name.description: PublisherName is the name of the publisher of the document.

sha256.description: SHA256 is the SHA256 hash of the document content.

title.description: Title is the title of the document.

url.description: URL is the target media link provided by the bot.

transcript.description: Transcript contains the transcribed text from the tiktok video.

data.description: Data contains the final extraction results. It is omitted if the job is not yet completed.

error.description: Error contains the error message if the extraction failed. It is omitted otherwise.

jobId.description: JobID is the unique identifier for the extraction task.

status.description: Status indicates the current state of the extraction job.

items.description: Items contains the paginated data items

page.description: Page is the current page number

per_page.description: PerPage is the number of items per page

total_items.description: TotalItems is the total number of items available

citations.description:
Citations are the specific pieces of knowledge-base evidence the
verdict is based on. Empty whenever Verdict is insufficient_evidence.

claim.description: Claim is the normalized sub-claim text that was actually checked.

reasoning.description: Reasoning is the judge's explanation for the verdict.

recommend_medical_consult.description:
RecommendMedicalConsult is true whenever the claim's subject matter
warrants recommending a real doctor — this system provides quick
access to reliable information, it does not replace one.

severity.description: Severity is one of: routine, serious, emergency.

verdict.description:
Verdict is one of: supported, contradicted, partially_supported, mixed, insufficient_evidence.
insufficient_evidence never implies the claim itself is right or wrong
— only that the knowledge base had nothing relevant to check it against.

publication_year.description: PublicationYear is the year the document was published.

publisher_name.description: PublisherName is the name of the publisher of the document.

title.description: Title is the title of the document.

created_at.description: CreatedAt is the timestamp when the document was created.

file_url_presigned.description: FileURLPresigned is the presigned URL for accessing the document file.

filename.description: Filename is the name of the document file.

filesize.description: Filesize is the size of the document file in bytes.

filetype.description: Filetype is the mime type of the document file (e.g., "application/pdf", "text/plain").

id.description: ID is the unique identifier for the document.

ingested_at.description: IngestedAt is the timestamp when the document was ingested into the system.

modified_at.description: ModifiedAt is the timestamp when the document was last modified.

page_count.description: PageCount is the number of pages in the document (if applicable).

publication_year.description: PublicationYear is the year the document was published.

publisher_name.description: PublisherName is the name of the publisher of the document.

sha256.description: SHA256 is the SHA256 hash of the document content.

title.description: Title is the title of the document.
